name: agent-relay
description: Local-first control plane for Codex sessions with optional public broker pairing.

scripts.test: node --test claude-worker/*.test.mjs frontend/*.test.mjs frontend/remote/*.test.mjs scripts/e2e/harness/*.test.mjs && vite build
scripts.test:claude: npm run test:claude:provider && npm run test:claude:browser
scripts.test:browser:local-core:fake: AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake npm run build && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-session-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-auth-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-allowed-roots-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-file-diff-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-history-scroll-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-local-thread-groups-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:browser:public-core: npm run build && node scripts/browser-public-transcript-delta-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-broker-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-enrollment-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-refresh-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-persistence-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-revoke-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-reclaim-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:browser:public-core:fake: AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake npm run build && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-transcript-delta-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-broker-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-enrollment-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-refresh-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-persistence-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-revoke-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-reclaim-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:browser:public: npm run build && node scripts/browser-public-enrollment-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-transcript-delta-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-refresh-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-persistence-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-revoke-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-reclaim-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-broker-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-long-transcript-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-remote-follow-e2e.mjs && node scripts/browser-public-multi-remote-follow-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:browser:public:fake: AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake npm run build && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-enrollment-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-transcript-delta-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-refresh-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-persistence-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-revoke-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-reclaim-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-broker-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-long-transcript-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-remote-follow-e2e.mjs && AGENT_PROVIDERS=fake node scripts/browser-public-multi-remote-follow-e2e.mjs
